body.title: Fix web server 8080: group channel + DM support
body.result: Superseded by T-uc-channel-tabs-redesign. Channel tabs + comms:// routing replace the old session-based web channels.
body.description: Port 8080 web server currently has a disconnected group channel. Should support: (1) group channel that actually works, (2) DMs between users (like the CC↔Igor bridge was). Akien wants both on 8080.
